summary: DHH promotes TextDrive's Christmas deal offering a year of hosting for $99 on their $12/month plan. He positions TextDrive as the official Rails host, encouraging readers to support Rails development through their hosting choice. He also teases a redesigned Ruby on Rails web presence with a new logo, crediting Jakob Skjerning, Jon Hicks, and Marten Veldthuis for the design work.
key_points: TextDrive offers a discounted annual hosting plan at $99 (normally $144/year) as a Christmas promotion
TextDrive is positioned as the official Rails host, tying hosting purchases to supporting Rails development
A redesigned Ruby on Rails website and new logo are in development
money_quotes: Sign up before December 25th and get a whole year for $99.
You get to flash the fact that you're supporting the development of Rails by choosing the official Rails host.
key_insight: Early Rails community-building involved tying commercial hosting partnerships directly to open source project support, making purchasing decisions feel like contributions to the framework.
